label: formal language theory
evidence: Mathlib/Computability/Language (87 decls) formalizes formal languages (Kleene algebra of languages); sibling folders ContextFreeGrammar, RegularExpressions cover the rest of the field.

label: formal language theory
evidence: Mathlib/Computability/ContextFreeGrammar (68 decls) covers context-free grammars, a core topic of formal language theory.

label: formal language theory
evidence: Mathlib/Computability/RegularExpressions (47 decls) covers regular expressions/regular languages, a core topic of formal language theory.

label: manifold theory
evidence: Mathlib/Geometry/Manifold (3151 decls) is exactly the formal home of manifold theory: charts, smooth structures, tangent bundles, manifolds with boundary/corners.
